case_title: ANNA S. LEE VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDNAT ANNA LEE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ANNA S. LEE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: TAMRA KEEN, CSR# 5404 (206)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ANNA S. HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ANNA S.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-18-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ANNA S. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY 240 LOMBARD CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION PARC TELEGRAPH LOMBARD PLAZA OWNERS ASSOCIATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-18-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-03-2009
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF LEE, ANNA S.
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF ANNA S. LEE IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
